reviews.comment:
El servicio de hoteleria muy bueno , la atención de restaurante excelente ,la atención del personal buenísima pero faltaría un lavadero de auto para ser una excelencia en hoteleria de ruta

(Translated by Google)
The hotel service was very good, the restaurant service was excellent, and the staff was very attentive, but a car wash would be needed to be an excellent hotel on the road.
